name: The Mo
overview: A tribute ink scandal topples the Li family’s long-standing ink business, leaving their legacy in ruins. Years later, Li Zhen, the determined youngest daughter, sets out to restore her family's name. As she rises in the industry, she joins forces with Luo Wenqian, heir to another fallen clan, to take on a rising rival and face new challenges from foreign markets, fighting to bring Huizhou ink back to its former glory.

trailers.title: Trailer: A Block Of Huimo Ink🖤, Distilled With Endless Craft💪|The Mo 家业| iQIYI |Stay tuned
